creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
make of gimp1 port fails to build necessary gtk library, and fails.
manually building gtk12 port fails to build necessary glib port.  I'm
suspecting that other required ports will not get built automatically,
either.

Fix: 

It seems I have to manually build all of the dependencies before I can
build the main app.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/graphics/gimp1
make
